title: simple tntnuke
description: a simple cmd /nuke <player> <amout of tnt> needed perm nuke.kill
body:
this plugin can work in order versions you might experience a bug though if you go back to far

you can do **/nuke <player> <amout of tnt to summon on player>** **PERM nuke.kill**

**DISCORD**
https://discord.gg/VmdVTaKsXW


**WARNING**
this can cuse your server to crash/lag



you are allowed to make forks of the project when the code is released on guthuh soon




Credits:                                                                                                   
made by justkillercam (justkillercam77 on modeinth) the original creator suparblaiz no one has access to this project
